Terms of Service

Last updated: 11 June 2026

By using neuralhorizonsai.com or any of our services, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

1. About Us

These Terms of Service govern your use of the Neural Horizons AI website and services. Neural Horizons AI F.Z.E is registered in Ajman Free Zone, United Arab Emirates.

Company: Neural Horizons AI F.Z.E
Address: Ajman Free Zone Office C1-1F-SF20904, Ajman, UAE
Email: support@neuralhorizonsai.com

2. Services

Neural Horizons AI provides:

  • Free AI Audit — a Zonar™-powered revenue diagnostic tool
  • AI strategy consulting and implementation services
  • Agentic AI build and deployment services
  • Digital transformation consulting
  • AI training and education programmes
  • HALU™ autonomous AI agent deployment
  • Zonar OS™ implementation

3. Free AI Audit

The Free AI Audit is provided at no cost as an indicative diagnostic tool. Results are generated by AI and are based on the information you provide. They are indicative only and do not constitute professional financial, legal or business advice.

By submitting the audit form, you agree to receive a follow-up email from Neural Horizons AI. You may unsubscribe at any time.

4. Paid Services

Paid consulting and implementation services are governed by a separate Statement of Work or Service Agreement signed between Neural Horizons AI and the client. In the absence of a separate agreement, these Terms of Service apply.

All prices are quoted in AED unless otherwise stated. Payment terms are specified in individual project proposals. Neural Horizons AI reserves the right to suspend services for non-payment.

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including text, images, logos, Zonar™, HALU™, Zonar OS™, and all associated branding — is the intellectual property of Neural Horizons AI F.Z.E and is protected by applicable copyright and trademark law.

You may not reproduce, distribute or use any content from this website without prior written permission from Neural Horizons AI.

Custom work produced for clients remains the property of the client upon full payment, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use our website or services for any unlawful purpose
  • Submit false or misleading information in our forms
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems
  • Use our AI Audit to reverse-engineer our proprietary methodology
  • Resell or redistribute our services without written permission

7. Disclaimer of Warranties

Our website and free tools are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. The AI Audit report is generated by artificial intelligence and is provided for informational purposes only. Neural Horizons AI makes no guarantee that the recommendations will achieve specific results.

Results from paid services vary by client, industry, market conditions and implementation quality. Past results (including AED 9M+ generated for clients) are not a guarantee of future performance.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Neural Horizons AI F.Z.E shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from your use of our website or services, including loss of profits, data or business opportunities.

Our total liability for any claim arising from paid services shall not exceed the total fees paid by you to Neural Horizons AI in the 12 months preceding the claim.

9. Confidentiality

Any confidential business information you share with us during a consultation or engagement will be treated as confidential and will not be disclosed to third parties without your consent, except where required by law.

10. Governing Law

These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the UAE.

11. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. The date at the top of this page shows when they were last updated. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

12. Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
Email: support@neuralhorizonsai.com
Phone: +971 (0) 58 569 7562
